characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Short blonde bob haircut. Symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Beige blazer over a light-colored top, delicate silver necklace.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Short reddish-brown hair with bangs.
characters.wardrobe: White spaghetti-strap top, black lavalier microphone clipped to the neckline.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, slightly confused initially, then surprised and engaged.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?]
Character B says: I try to burn the candle. [I try to burn the candle.]
Character A says: शायद तुम कहना चाहती हो, 'I am trying to light the candle.' [Maybe you want to say, 'I am trying to light the candle.']
Character B says: Okay. I'm trying to light the candle. मुझे इसकी smell बहुत पसंद है। [Okay. I'm trying to light the candle. I really like its smell.]
Character A says: English में 'smell' अक्सर बुरी महक के लिए इस्तेमाल होता है। तुम्हें 'scent' कहना चाहिए। [In English, 'smell' is often used for bad odors. You should say 'scent'.]
Character B says: Okay. I really love the scent of the candle. [Okay. I really love the scent of the candle.]
Character A says: Perfect! [Perfect!]
Character B says: मुझे सच में रोज़ English बोलने की practice चाहिए! [I really need daily English speaking practice!]
Character A says: तो फिर रोज़ किसी के साथ English में बात करो। [Then speak with someone in English every day.]
Character B says: पर महंगे tutors के लिए पैसे नहीं हैं मेरे पास! [But I don't have money for expensive tutors!]
Character A says: तो AI tutors से बात करो ना। [Then talk to AI tutors.]
Character B says: मुझे किसी robot से बात नहीं करनी। [I don't want to talk to a robot.]
Character A says: Surprise! मैं भी तो एक AI teacher हूँ! [Surprise! I am also an AI teacher!]
Character B says: तुम? पर तुम तो बिल्कुल असली इंसान जैसी हो! [You? But you are exactly like a real human!]
Character A says: Supernova app पर practice करना बिल्कुल ऐसा ही है। रोज़ मेरे साथ practice करो। [Practicing on the Supernova app is exactly like this. Practice with me every day.]
Character B says: Okay! तो मैं आज ही Supernova download करती हूँ और रोज़ practice करती हूँ! [Okay! So I'll download Supernova today itself and practice every day!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, real-world English mistake (burn vs. light, smell vs. scent).
- Introduces the problem of needing affordable daily speaking practice.
- Reveals the AI tutor twist, showing how natural and human-like the Supernova AI feels.
- Ends with a clear call-to-action to download the app.
